## Introduction

As an experienced DevOps/Platform Engineer, I am passionate about automation and the transformative potential it holds — pushing the boundaries of what is possible and contributing to a future where automation is integrated seamlessly into our lives, creating a more efficient, sustainable, and prosperous world. With a proactive approach, I am always eager to initiate and lead potential projects. I thrive as a team player, valuing collaboration and emphasizing the collective efforts of the team. I am keen on leveraging the Agile maturity level of a team to drive successful outcomes.
